release_notes: First public validation release of the cross-platform Media Experiment Ledger Studio desktop application. This beta is intended for end-to-end package, workflow and usability evaluation before signed stable qualification. The release pipeline now isolates unsigned prerelease packaging from stable signing credentials and validates native Linux package metadata.
features: Cross-platform Electron and Vuetify desktop workspace for local media experiments
Durable image and video import, hashing, proxy generation and resumable jobs
Image and video Atlas evidence with editable report documents and static PDF export
YOLOX and NanoDet-Plus detection with verified built-in decoders and user-supplied ONNX manifests
Credential profiles, media automation budgets, recovery center and update workflows
Windows installer and portable, macOS arm64 and x64, Linux AppImage and deb packages
Collision-safe release versioning, exact source-SHA builds and packaged application launch evidence
Unsigned prerelease builds isolated from stable signing and notarization secrets
Validated Linux package publisher, maintainer, homepage and desktop integration metadata
Responsive product branding, release documentation and repository app-main entry
